summary: Completed the C match for sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.c, removed the 4145-line tobj.s assembly fallback, and switched the build/configuration to compile tobj.c as Matching. The final match relied on small semantic and codegen-sensitive fixes in texture object cleanup, texture coordinate generation calls, function linkage, string literals, header prototypes, and symbol metadata.
what_changed: Deleted asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s, removing the prior assembly implementation for tobj.c.
Changed configure.py from Object(NonMatching, "sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.c") to Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.c").
Changed obj_files.mk to build src/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.c.o instead of asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s.o.
In HSD_TObjAddAnim, replaced HSD_TlutFree(tobj->tluttbl[i]) with HSD_TlutRemove(tobj->tluttbl[i]) when clearing existing TLUT table entries.
Changed HSD_TlutRemove so it directly frees the HSD_Tlut memory piece with hsdFreeMemPiece(tlut, sizeof(HSD_Tlut)) instead of delegating to HSD_TlutFree.
Made TObjSetupMtx static in tobj.c, matching its local-use/linkage expectations.
Added a GXSetTexCoordGen macro in GXAttr.h that wraps GXSetTexCoordGen2 with GX_DISABLE and GX_PTIDENTITY default arguments.
Adjusted setupTextureCoordGen, setupTextureCoordGenBump, and setupTextureCoordGenToon to use GXSetTexCoordGen in selected cases, including local temporaries for src and mtxid before the call.
Removed an explicit embedded NUL from the HSD_Panic string in HSD_TexMapID2PTTexMtx: "unexpected texmap id.\n\0" became "unexpected texmap id.\n".
Added missing tobj.h declarations for HSD_TObjRemove, HSD_TlutRemove, HSD_TObjTevFree, and HSD_TObjTevRemove.

Updated symbols.txt object boundaries/types around HSD_TObj_804056B8/HSD_TObj_804056D8/HSD_TObj_8040574C, string/data labels such as HSD_TObj_804058B8 and HSD_TObj_80405958, and several sdata HSD_TObj labels.
smart_moves: Used a small SDK-style GXSetTexCoordGen wrapper macro rather than duplicating GXSetTexCoordGen2 arguments everywhere, giving the compiler a call shape closer to the original source.
Introduced local variables for GXTexGenSrc src and u32 mtxid before selected GXSetTexCoordGen calls, a common register/allocation-sensitive tactic for matching CodeWarrior output.
Distinguished HSD_TlutRemove from HSD_TlutFree: Remove now only frees the TLUT struct memory piece, while AddAnim uses Remove when disposing table-held TLUT pointers.
Cleaned up symbol sizes and string annotations after the C match so data/sdata boundaries reflect the matched object layout rather than stale assembly-era ranges.
Kept the final PR focused: only 35 additions and targeted edits were needed to retire a large assembly file.
decomp_lessons: A final asm-removal PR may require tiny non-obvious C edits, not large rewrites: linkage, helper macro spelling, local temporaries, string literal contents, and cleanup helper selection can all affect matching.

When a Dolphin/GX SDK function has a convenience wrapper in original code, modeling that wrapper as a macro can produce better matching call sequences than always calling the expanded low-level function directly.
Free/remove pairs should not be assumed equivalent. In this PR, HSD_TlutRemove and HSD_TlutFree needed different implementations to match expected behavior/codegen.
Explicit "\0" in C string literals changes emitted data; remove it when the original only had the normal terminator.
After matching a file, update both configure.py and obj_files.mk together so the build stops linking the assembly fallback.
Symbol map corrections are part of the match: fully matched C can expose previously coarse global object labels that need splitting into smaller objects or strings.
naming_conventions: Texture-object APIs use the HSD_TObj* prefix, e.g. HSD_TObjRemove, HSD_TObjRemoveAll, HSD_TObjAlloc.
Texture lookup table APIs use the HSD_Tlut* prefix, with distinct Free and Remove functions.
Texture-object TEV APIs use HSD_TObjTev* names, e.g. HSD_TObjTevFree and HSD_TObjTevRemove.
Unidentified/global data labels in symbols.txt retain address-based names like HSD_TObj_804056B8 and HSD_TObj_804D5CA0.
Jump tables are named with the jumptable_ADDRESS convention, e.g. jumptable_804057C0.
The added GXSetTexCoordGen macro follows Dolphin SDK-style naming and delegates to GXSetTexCoordGen2.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted the entire 4145-line tobj.s once the C file became matching.
Changed object classification from NonMatching to Matching and redirected obj_files.mk from asm/tobj.s.o to src/tobj.c.o.
Used wrapper macro expansion for GXSetTexCoordGen2 default parameters to match original call patterns.
Used local temporaries before GX calls to influence argument evaluation/register placement.
Changed TObjSetupMtx to static to match local symbol/linkage expectations.
Adjusted string literal contents to align rodata/sdata layout.
Refined symbols.txt object sizes and data:string annotations to reflect the new matched data layout.

review_feedback.text: No substantive review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that add SDK-style GX wrapper macros to improve matching.
Find other baselib PRs where Remove and Free functions were separated for matching or lifecycle correctness.
Search for remaining NonMatching sysdolphin/baselib objects after tobj.c was matched.
Audit symbols.txt updates around HSD_TObj_* labels for later renames from address labels to semantic names.
Compare texture coordinate generation matching tactics in tev.c, mobj.c, and tobj.c.
